nodes.context: South Korean gang active between 1993 and 1994, involved in murder, extortion, kidnapping, cannibalism, and rape.
South Korean copycat gang inspired by the Chijon Family, arrested in 1996.

edges.evidence_quote: At the same time as the 1996 North Korean commandos infiltration incident , there was a South Korean nine-member copycat gang inspired by the Chijon Family. The copycat gang called themselves the Maggapa (막가파).
edges.context: Maggapa was a copycat gang inspired by the Chijon Family.
